title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
